transition.label: env_scenario == SCENARIO_NORMAL && c_meas <= D_meas
channel_report!
ChannelClass = highest_priority_CH(), channel_degraded_flag = false, ch_enabled_count = 1, channel_report_pending = false, c_meas = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED && c_meas <= D_meas
channel_report!
ChannelClass = highest_priority_CH(), channel_degraded_flag = true, ch_enabled_count = 1, channel_report_pending = false, c_meas = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED && c_meas <= D_meas
channel_report!
ChannelClass = highest_priority_CH(), channel_degraded_flag = true, ch_enabled_count = 1, channel_report_pending = false, c_meas = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED && c_meas <= D_meas
channel_report!
ChannelClass = highest_priority_CH(), channel_degraded_flag = true, ch_enabled_count = 1, channel_report_pending = false, c_meas = 0
publish report and update finite state
c_sig <= D_sig
signal_report!
SignalClass = SIGNALCLASS_RECONFIGURING, signal_report_pending = false, c_sig = 0
publish report and update finite state
PilotDensityClass == PILOTDENSITYCLASS_OK && BLERClass == BLERCLASS_OK && DRTClass == DRTCLASS_OK
signal_report!
SignalClass = SIGNALCLASS_PILOT_BASED, signal_report_pending = false, c_sig = 0
publish report and update finite state
PilotDensityClass == PILOTDENSITYCLASS_LOW && PayloadSenseClass != PAYLOADSENSECLASS_FAILED
signal_report!
SignalClass = SIGNALCLASS_PAYLOAD_ASSISTED, signal_report_pending = false, c_sig = 0
publish report and update finite state
BLERClass != BLERCLASS_OK || DRTClass == DRTCLASS_BAD || PayloadSenseClass == PAYLOADSENSECLASS_FAILED
signal_report!
SignalClass = SIGNALCLASS_LIMITED, signal_report_pending = false, signal_degraded_flag = true, c_sig = 0
publish report and update finite state
PRSClass != PRSCLASS_FAILED
beam_report!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_TRACK
publish report and update finite state
BeamErrorClass == BEAMERRORCLASS_LOCKABLE
beam_report!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_LOCKED
publish report and update finite state
AccClass == ACCCLASS_FAILED || BeamErrorClass == BEAMERRORCLASS_CRITICAL
beam_report!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_MISALIGNED, beam_degraded_flag = true
publish report and update finite state
MisClass == MISCLASS_OK
beam_report!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_LOCKED
publish report and update finite state
MisClass == MISCLASS_WARN || BlockageClass == BLOCKAGECLASS_SUSPECTED
beam_report!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_PREDICT
publish report and update finite state
c_rec == D_BM && BeamErrorClass != BEAMERRORCLASS_LOCKABLE && BlockageClass != BLOCKAGECLASS_CONFIRMED
beam_failure!
BeamClass = BEAMCLASS_FAILED
beam recovery outcome
env_scenario == SCENARIO_NORMAL && c_sense <= D_sense
sensing_report!
SensingState = highest_priority_SQ(), sensing_report_pending = false, sensing_degraded_flag = false, sensing_qos_ok = true, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED && c_sense <= D_sense
sensing_report!
SensingState = highest_priority_SQ(), sensing_report_pending = false, sensing_degraded_flag = false, sensing_qos_ok = true, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED && c_sense <= D_sense
sensing_report!
SensingState = highest_priority_SQ(), sensing_report_pending = false, sensing_degraded_flag = true, sensing_qos_ok = false, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED && c_sense <= D_sense
sensing_report!
SensingState = highest_priority_SQ(), sensing_report_pending = false, sensing_failure_flag = true, sensing_qos_ok = false, sq_enabled_count = 1, c_sense = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_NORMAL && c_report <= D_report
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYNORMAL, phy_kpi_report_pending = false, comm_ok = true, sensing_qos_ok = true, degradation_flag = false, c_report = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED && c_report <= D_report
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYCOMMUNICATIONDEGRADED, phy_kpi_report_pending = false, comm_ok = false, sensing_qos_ok = true, degradation_flag = true, c_report = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED && c_report <= D_report
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYSENSINGDEGRADED, phy_kpi_report_pending = false, comm_ok = true, sensing_qos_ok = false, degradation_flag = true, c_report = 0
publish report and update finite state
env_scenario == SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED && c_report <= D_report
phy_kpi_report!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYJOINTDEGRADED, phy_kpi_report_pending = false, comm_ok = false, sensing_qos_ok = false, degradation_flag = true, c_report = 0
publish report and update finite state
ChannelClass == CHANNELCLASS_OUTAGE || BeamClass == BEAMCLASS_FAILED || SensingState == SENSINGSTATE_SENSINGFAILURE
phy_failure!
PHYState = PHYSTATE_PHYFAILURE
degradation or failure branch
measure_tick!

env_scenario = SCENARIO_NORMAL, TimingOk = true, SINRClass = SINRCLASS_OK, IClass = ICLASS_OK, PowerClass = POWERCLASS_OK, AoSClass = AOSCLASS_FRESH, PdClass = PDCLASS_OK, RfaClass = RFACLASS_OK, c_env = 0
measure_tick!

env_scenario = SCENARIO_COMM_DEGRADED, TimingOk = true, SINRClass = SINRCLASS_OK, IClass = ICLASS_CRITICAL, PowerClass = POWERCLASS_OK, AoSClass = AOSCLASS_FRESH, PdClass = PDCLASS_OK, RfaClass = RFACLASS_OK, c_env = 0
measure_tick!

env_scenario = SCENARIO_SENSING_DEGRADED, TimingOk = true, SINRClass = SINRCLASS_OK, IClass = ICLASS_OK, PowerClass = POWERCLASS_OK, AoSClass = AOSCLASS_STALE, PdClass = PDCLASS_OK, RfaClass = RFACLASS_OK, c_env = 0
measure_tick!

env_scenario = SCENARIO_JOINT_DEGRADED, TimingOk = true, SINRClass = SINRCLASS_OUTAGE, IClass = ICLASS_CRITICAL, PowerClass = POWERCLASS_ABSENT, AoSClass = AOSCLASS_EXPIRED, PdClass = PDCLASS_FAILED, RfaClass = RFACLASS_CRITICAL, c_env = 0
target_detected!
PRSClass = PRSCLASS_OK, BeamErrorClass = BEAMERRORCLASS_LOCKABLE, BlockageClass = BLOCKAGECLASS_NONE
